ai_summary: Diamines and Chemicals Limited has notified stock exchanges of its participation in the 'Saksham Niveshak' campaign, a 100-day outreach initiative from the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (IEPFA). The company is urging shareholders to claim their unpaid/unclaimed dividends and update KYC details to prevent mandatory transfer of these funds to the IEPF after seven years. This proactive communication reflects standard regulatory compliance and investor outreach, with no material adverse financial impacts or red flags.
